title: Kim Ward
compiled_truth: Kim Ward is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-31), Kim Ward sent 365 and received 621 emails, totalling 986 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dan Hyvl](people/dan-hyvl) (33), [Chris Foster](people/chris-foster) (27), [Barry Tycholiz](people/barry-tycholiz) (17), [Jason Williams](people/jason-williams) (16), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (15). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, personal, sent, sent_items.
